The '''Defense Force Command Compound''' was the military headquarters of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Built after the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] had [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|retaken]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], it was built as part of an effort to speed up the symbolic transfer of the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] from [[Denon/Legends|Denon]]. It contained a deep underground facility, which was designed in case of orbital bombardment. The building was filled with multiple planning and analysis rooms, many of which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had never heard of, let alone been in, despite the fact that his advice was often sought on military matters in the time between the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Swarm War]].

Members of the Defense Force nicknamed the underground portion of the compound "the Dark Star".
